comment_text.sn11.7:1.4: It seems that even when on retreat, Sakka was thinking of Vepacitti, and Vepacitti was thinking of Sakka.
comment_text.sn11.7:4.1: Despite their differences, both sides in a dispute respect morality and each other.
comment_text.sn11.7:4.6: Vepacitti is reminding Sakka of their family connection. His wife is the Asura maiden Sujā (SN 11.12:6.1), hence the titans are his brothers (DN 20:12.3).

root_text.sn11.7:1.2: “Bhūtapubbaṁ, bhikkhave, sakkassa devānamindassa rahogatassa paṭisallīnassa evaṁ cetaso parivitakko udapādi:
root_text.sn11.7:1.3: ‘yopi me assa supaccatthiko tassapāhaṁ na dubbheyyan’ti.
root_text.sn11.7:1.4: Atha kho, bhikkhave, vepacitti asurindo sakkassa devānamindassa cetasā cetoparivitakkamaññāya yena sakko devānamindo tenupasaṅkami.
root_text.sn11.7:1.5: Addasā kho, bhikkhave, sakko devānamindo vepacittiṁ asurindaṁ dūratova āgacchantaṁ.
root_text.sn11.7:2.1: ‘Yadeva te, mārisa, pubbe cittaṁ, tadeva tvaṁ mā pajahāsī’ti.

translation_text.sn11.7:1.2: “Once upon a time, mendicants, as Sakka, lord of gods, was in private retreat this thought came to his mind,
translation_text.sn11.7:1.3: ‘I should never betray even a sworn enemy.’
translation_text.sn11.7:1.4: And then Vepacitti, lord of titans, knowing Sakka’s train of thought, approached him.
translation_text.sn11.7:1.5: Sakka saw Vepacitti coming off in the distance,
translation_text.sn11.7:2.1: ‘Good fellow, don’t give up the idea you just had!’
translation_text.sn11.7:3.1: ‘Swear, Vepacitti, that you won’t betray me.’
translation_text.sn11.7:4.1: ‘Whatever bad things happen to a liar,
translation_text.sn11.7:4.2: or to someone who slanders the noble ones,
translation_text.sn11.7:4.3: or to someone who betrays a friend,
translation_text.sn11.7:4.6: anyone who betrays you, Sujā’s husband.’”

variant_text.sn11.7:2.1: tadeva tvaṁ mā pajahāsī’ti → tadeva tvaṁ mārisa pahāsīti (bj); tadeva tvaṁ mārisa jahāsīti (sya-all, km); tad eva tvam mā pahāsīti (pts1ed)

reference_text.sn11.7:1.1: cck15.287, csp1ed12.227, csp2ed12.227, ms12S1_1591, msdiv253, pts-vp-pli2ed1.485, sya15.330
